name: @ptdl/plugin-line-generator
displayName.vi-VN: Bộ sinh dòng theo quy tắc
description: Turn one parent record into N child rows in one transaction. One config covers BOM explosion, commission splits, and cost allocation — with cross-relation matching, dynamic recipients, group-and-sum, and rounding. Run on demand or auto-run on save, with a dry-run preview + debugger.
